commands.repair_reason: Needs human maintainer/security handling and contributor-owned real behavior proof; there is no narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to repair automatically.; Cleared: The patch tightens current-tab SSRF enforcement before snapshot content reads and keeps workflow credentials non-persistent; I found no concrete security regression in the diff. (sha=d157dfd8301f0380c004f7f4cc816350475ad7ae)
commands.review_summary:
This PR moves the browser `/snapshot` current-tab URL guard ahead of snapshot content reads, adds direct-CDP and existing-session route regression tests, and changes the OpenGrep PR scan checkout to full history.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +192, Config 0. Total +192 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than a live run. Current origin/main can reach direct-CDP snapshot readers without the current-tab result guard when Playwright is unavailable, and the PR adds mocked route coverage for that path.
commands.review_followup: Needs human maintainer/security handling and contributor-owned real behavior proof; there is no narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to repair automatically.

target.title: fix(browser): validate current tab before snapshots
target.body:
## Summary
- Validates the selected browser tab URL before returning snapshot data.
- Adds route-level regression coverage for local-managed direct-CDP snapshot paths.

## Changes
- Applies the existing browser navigation result guard before `/snapshot` branches read page content.
- Keeps the existing request validation order for incompatible snapshot options.
- Covers ARIA and AI role snapshot CDP paths when the current tab is blocked by policy.
- Rebased onto current `openclaw/main` and dropped the stale gateway reload test stabilization because current `main` deleted that file.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --reporter=verbose extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.existing-session.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.local-managed.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-activation-boundary.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.local-managed.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.existing-session.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/existing-session.test-support.ts src/plugin-activation-boundary.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.local-managed.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.existing-session.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/existing-session.test-support.ts src/plugin-activation-boundary.test.ts`
- `node scripts/check-src-extension-import-boundary.mjs --json`
- `node scripts/check-sdk-package-extension-import-boundary.mjs --json`
- `node scripts/check-test-helper-extension-import-boundary.mjs --json`
- `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- `actionlint .github/workflows/opengrep-precise.yml` was not run locally because `actionlint` is not installed in this checkout.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior addressed:** `/snapshot` validates the selected current tab URL before ChromeMCP, Playwright, or direct CDP snapshot readers can return page content. With strict browser SSRF policy, blocked private current-tab URLs now fail before ARIA or AI direct-CDP snapshot content is read, while the existing-session ChromeMCP guard remains in place.
- **Real environment tested:** Local checkout of branch `570` at `4c9c1e8ae2`, rebased on `openclaw/main` `bfddd45e25`, Node `v22.22.2`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran the focused browser route tests with verbose Vitest output:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --reporter=verbose \
  extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.existing-session.test.ts \
  extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.local-managed.test.ts
```

- **Evidence after fix:** The executed route tests reported these protected `/snapshot` cases as passing:

```text
✓ local-managed browser snapshot routes > blocks ARIA CDP snapshots when the current tab violates browser navigation policy
✓ local-managed browser snapshot routes > blocks AI CDP role snapshots when the current tab violates browser navigation policy
✓ existing-session browser routes > checks existing-session snapshot URL when SSRF policy is configured
✓ existing-session browser routes > blocks existing-session snapshots when the current URL violates browser navigation policy
✓ existing-session browser routes > rejects existing-session snapshot selectors before checking the current URL

Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  16 passed (16)
```

- **Observed result after fix:** The local-managed ARIA and AI CDP route tests execute `GET /snapshot` handlers with `ssrfPolicy: { dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork: false }` and a current tab at `http://127.0.0.1:8080/admin`; both return the policy error and assert that `snapshotAria` / `snapshotRoleViaCdp` are not called. The existing-session tests execute the ChromeMCP route path and prove the current URL guard still runs, blocked URLs fail before `takeChromeMcpSnapshot`, and selector rejection still happens before the URL guard.
- **What was not tested:** I did not run a full live browser-control recording against a real Chromium instance, and I did not run the full repository test suite. CI started on the pushed head after the rebase.

## Notes
- No changelog entry; this is an internal browser-route behavior fix.
- `USER.md` was not added to commits.
